query:
ALTER TABLE contacts 
  ADD COLUMN stageClassification VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'desconhecido',
  ADD COLUMN referralWindowStart TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN referralCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN lastPurchaseAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN totalPurchases INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN totalSpentCents BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

CREATE INDEX contacts_classification_idx ON contacts (tenantId, stageClassification);
